ab: kivi, i tjumaq sun?
en: kivi, are you home?

ab: itjumaq kirimu. sa qumaqanu.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: kivi, i tjumaq sun?
en: kivi, are you home?

ab: neka ti kivi! itjumaq ti muni aken izua anema kudain? ku kikai anga ti kivi. nu mangetjez
ch: B:kivi不在家耶!我是muni，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告kivi。
en: kivi is not at home. I am muni. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: tima mun?
en: Who are you?

ab: vuvu tiamen ti tjuku kati kivi pusaladji a men a semuqeljev ta paljing!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是tjuku和kivi，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are tjuku and kivi, please open the door for us.

ab: tima a?
en: Who is it?

ab: ti tjanubak a ken, mangetjez a ken a karim tjai camak.
en: I am tjanubak, I am here for camak.

ab: vuvu mangetjez a ken a pacun tjanu sun.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: cuacuay anga su a inika mangedjez singelit aken aravac tjanusun.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: kivi, mangetjez aken a karim tjanu sun ta kivangavang.
en: kivi, I am here to play with you.

ab: kirimu saqumaqanun cuai anga ken a kaljava tjanusun.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: aicu a vurasi ku sinitalem pai kilingavi a keman.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: qaljemqem angata a icu a vurasi.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: idu samazaw! aicu ku sinitalem a kudamunu, kilingavi a keman.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: qaljemqem aravac a icu a kudamunu.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: qiladju! ku sinitalem aicu a punug neka nu hiliu kilingavi a keman.
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: uwa! qaljemqem aravac aicu a punug.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: keman sun ta valjetjuk?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: ini aken a maqatia a keman ta valjetjuk, bulai a keman aken ta linggu.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: keman sun ta pingkan?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: nanguaq, tjengelay aken aravac.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: ku sitjuljakan tua kudamunu tu su kanen.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: masalu, liyaw a qetim na aicu a kudamunu.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: malap a ken ta zalujm tu ku sipatekel tjanusun sun.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: masalu.
en: Thank you.

ab: suliavu a keman, na kemesa ken a pakaliyaw ta djamay.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: uwa! nguljingulj angata nu kanen sanguaq uta.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: suliavu a keman, liyaw a nan a imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: inia aken a masiyaq yu!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: suliavu a keman, liyaw a nan a imaza.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: liyaw anga ku kinan, nakuya anga keman.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
